relationships.context: Core positioning — deep candidate understanding via stories, AI evaluation against nuanced preferences
Partnership where Superposition owns employer pipeline, Careerspan powers candidate intelligence
Superposition relies on Careerspan for candidate intelligence, piping candidates into their existing systems
Powerful but expensive (~$20/sweep) technique for matching candidates to roles
Cheaper scalable alternative to full-database matching for pre-onboarded candidates
Two tiers of candidate matching — full sweep (expensive) vs quick check (cheap, scalable)
AI evaluation goes beyond keywords to match against nuanced company standards
